CONSTANTES ROTACIONAIS (Eq. 7 do artigo, J Mol Model 24:235)
----------------------------------------------
 ALFAE(cm-1) = 4.8270678332643e-03
 GAMAE(cm-1) = -5.9031904965062e-05
